## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Siit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, Airtable organization, and next steps for their collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airtable will be rebuilt for simplicity; industry-specific categories to be added](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Content strategy focusing on ITSM positioning; employee experience topics to be approached cautiously](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO approach planned for industry-specific articles](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Customer stories and case studies to be streamlined and potentially assisted by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Terminology refinement needed (e.g., "service requests" instead of "support tickets")](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)

## Topics

### Airtable Restructuring

  - [Current Airtable too complicated due to multiple contributors](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [New Airtable to be created with simplified structure](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Industry-specific categories to be added (e.g., healthcare, financial services)](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Programmatic approach for creating industry-specific articles (e.g., "How \[industry\] can improve IT support with AI-powered ticketing systems")](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Focus on ITSM positioning; cautious approach to employee experience topics](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Avoid positioning as an HR tool; target decision-makers with purchasing authority](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Integrate success stories from integration marketplaces (e.g., Rippling, Jamf)](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Technical articles on integrations (e.g., Okta, Kandji) requested by CPO](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

### Article Recalibration

  - [Articles shortened and tone adjusted for broader audience comprehension](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [CTA standardized to "Try for free" or "Start a free trial" (14-day trial)](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Terminology updates: "service requests" instead of "support tickets", "IT admin" instead of "IT agents"](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [Search intent focus: actionable strategies tied to Siit's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)

### Customer Stories and Case Studies

  - [Carmel interviewing customers for stories](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [GrowthX to potentially streamline the process and assist with metrics extraction](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Stories to be housed on a separate website page for better visibility and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

### Miscellaneous

  - [Image samples for content expected by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Google Search Console sitemap update pending (permission change needed)](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [Ongoing refinement of terminology and brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to clean up and update Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Carmel to review recalibrated articles and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [GrowthX to send customer story questions and terminology list to Carmel](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [Carmel to send any available customer stories to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide image samples and assist with Google Search Console setup](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Ongoing collaboration on content strategy and terminology refinement](https://fathom.video/share/bxN3isagVqfCXP1iBZ353ZUVVNHRwMJk?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
